Localization.Description: A user logged in to a host or logged out of a host

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged out of a vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged out of an ESXi host belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to a vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to a vCenter host {event_src.host}
